originalTitle: International ETFs: iShares EAFE ETF vs Vanguard Emerging Markets ETF
summary: Developed markets deliver higher yields and 5-year growth, while emerging markets offer lower costs and stronger recent momentum.
content: Developed markets deliver higher yields and 5-year growth, while emerging markets offer lower costs and stronger recent momentum.
chineseTitle: 国际 ETF：iShares EAFE ETF 与 Vanguard Emerging Markets ETF
chineseSummary: 发达市场提供更高的收益率和五年增长，而新兴市场则提供更低的成本和更强劲的近期势头。
chineseContent: 发达市场提供更高的收益率和五年增长，而新兴市场则提供更低的成本和更强劲的近期势头。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
